creator: rrghphar@bigpond.net.au
text:
Now that dependent packages devel/openthreads and graphics/openproducer have
been updated to 1.0 status, the full OpenSceneGraph package can be updated to
match.  Without doing this, the old OSG is unlikely to work with the new
dependencies.

Fix: 

Replace the contents of /usr/ports/graphics/osg/ with that contained in the
archive below. This patch requires that /usr/ports/devel/openthreads/ and
/usr/ports/graphics/openproducer have already been upgraded to use the 1.0 OSG
archive (ref PR ports/94998 and ports/98426, now closed).
How-To-Repeat: Build the osg package (0.9.8) using the current dependencies (openthreads 1.4.2
and openproducer 1.0.1).
